name: cramped metal area
description: I'm in a cramped metal area
hints: You are in a cramped space with no obvious exits. Look for hidden passages or ways to escape.
This may be inside something - a vent, crawlspace, or compartment. Try LOOK, FEEL, or examine your surroundings.
You may need to CRAWL, PUSH, or find a hidden mechanism to exit this confined space.
notes: Cramped metal area with no listed exits. The player must find a hidden way out. This may be accessed by crawling into machinery or compartments elsewhere in the ship.
